analysis.name: Zoho CRM
analysis.tagline: Top-rated Sales CRM Software by Customers
analysis.value_proposition: Comprehensive CRM platform for customer-facing teams with deep AI, customization, and automation for businesses of all sizes.
analysis.ideal_customer: Businesses of all sizes seeking an affordable, customizable, AI-enabled CRM — from small teams moving off spreadsheets to enterprises needing verticalized, low-code CRM platforms.

differentiators: Top-rated Sales CRM Software by Customers
CRM for everyone — cross-functional CRM extending beyond sales
Deep low-code/pro-code customization (Canvas, Client Scripts, Functions, GraphQL, ZDK CLI)
Zia AI suite: Agents, Generative AI, Prediction, Anomaly Detection, Vision AI
Part of the broader Zoho One suite of 45+ apps

recent_ships.source: landing nav: Customization > Canvas Design Studio

recent_ships.what: MCP for Zoho CRM (Model Context Protocol server)
Zia Agents — build and deploy AI agents for free
recent_ships.source: landing: 'Zia Agents — Build and deploy AI agents for free'

recent_ships.what: DAP (Digital Adoption Platform) launched across product suite
recent_ships.source: landing: 'NEW DAP — Platform to simplify software adoption'

praised: Broad functionality at low price; integrates with Zoho's wider suite
Commonly recommended as a startup CRM alongside HubSpot and Salesforce (HN: 'Ask HN: Do you use any CRM with your startup?')
complaints: UX historically criticized as cluttered vs. modern CRMs
Integrations depth varies vs. Salesforce ecosystem (implied by HN 'Salesforce, Zoho CRM and HubSpot API Cheat Sheets' framing)

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free for up to 3 users; basic CRM

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Automation, dashboards, mass email, custom fields (billed annually)

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: SalesSignals, Blueprint, inventory, web-to-case, validation rules

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Zia AI, CommandCenter, multi-user portals, Canvas, sandbox

tiers.name: Ultimate
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced BI (Analytics), enhanced storage, augmented AI

pricing.enterprise: $40+/user/month (Enterprise tier) or contact-sales for larger deployments
pricing.notes: Prices shown are typical billed-annually rates in USD; monthly billing is higher. Free tier capped at 3 users. Regional pricing varies. Tier prices were not fully rendered in the scraped pricing HTML — values reflect known public Zoho CRM pricing at time of writing and should be re-verified against the live pricing page.
